motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def racecar(self, target: int) -> int:
    speed = 1
    position = 0
    result = 0

    while position < target:
        if speed > 0:
            position += speed
            speed //= 2
        else:
            speed *= -1 if speed > 0 else 1
            position += speed
        result += 1

    return result

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log(target))
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
